---
name: Token change request
about: Propose adding, renaming, or removing a design token
labels: token
---

## Token name

<!-- e.g. --color-link-visited -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New token
- [ ] Rename existing token
- [ ] Remove token
- [ ] Change token value

## Current value (if changing)

```
--token-name: #current-value
```

## Proposed value / name

```
--token-name: #new-value
```

## Reason

<!-- Why is this change needed? What does it unblock? -->

## Components affected

<!-- Which component pages / React components use this token? -->
